zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hervey III於1360年出生在英國貝德福爾瑟利時，他的父親John de Hervey II30歲，母親Joan de Engaine22歲。他於1396年與Margaret Parles Hervey在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Harvey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hervey III was born in 1360, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, his father, John de Hervey II, was 30 and his mother, Joan de Engaine, was 22. He married Margaret Parles Hervey in 1396, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1419, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hervey III est né en 1360, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Hervey II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan d’Engaine, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Parles Hervey en 1396, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Hervey IIIが1360年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグで生まれた時，父John de Hervey IIは30歳，母Joan de Engaineは22歳であった。1396年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグでMargaret Parles Herveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスウルレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hervey III(이)가 1360년 영국 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Hervey II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Engaine(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 Margaret Parles Hervey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hervey III родился в 1360 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Hervey II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Engaine, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Parles Hervey в 1396 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1419 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
